---
title: Proposal title
author: Firstname Lastname
bibliography: references.bib
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/apa
thesis:
  degreetype: "Master of Science" # or Doctor of Philosophy
  degreetypeabbr: "M.Sc." # or Ph.D.
  submitmonth: "Month"
  submityear: "YYYY"
  institution: "McMaster University"
  degrees: "B.Sc. (Hons)" # list all previous degrees
  supervisor: "Supervisor name"
  member1: "Committee member 1"
  member2: "Committee member 2"
  #member3: "Committee member 3" # uncomment if applicable
execute:
  echo: false
format: macproposal-pdf
    
---

# Level 1 heading

These are two papers worth reading [@adams1987;@wolpert2011].

\lipsum[1]

## Level 2 heading

\lipsum[2]

### Level 3 heading

\lipsum[3]

```{r}
#| label: fig-figure1
#| fig-cap-location: top
#| fig-cap: "Figure caption title."
#| fig-subcap: _Note_. Figure caption description
#| out-width: 50%
knitr::include_graphics("figures/fig_placeholder.pdf")
```

\lipsum[4] @fig-figure1 shows some simulated data for a placeholder figure.

#### Level 4 heading

\lipsum[5]

##### Level 5 heading

\lipsum[6]


\newpage

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
